provisions.content: ملاحظة:تقبل طرقالقياسالأخرى في حالتوافقت معمعايير وكالةحماية البيئةالأمريكية،بشرط توفيرالوثائقالخاصة بطرقالقياس:

provisions.title: يجبعلى أصحابالكساراتوالمقالعمعايرة جهازرصد نوعيةالهواءالمحيط وفقخطة زمنيةمعتمدة،
provisions.content: يجبعلى أصحابالكساراتوالمقالعمعايرة جهازرصد نوعيةالهواءالمحيط وفقخطة زمنيةمعتمدة،لضمان أعلىدرجات الدقةفي القياس. كمايتوجب عليهمإجراءاتالمعايراتالتالية:

provisions.title: 1-المعايرة فيالموقع عندتركيب الجهازوبدورية ربعسنوية بطرقمعتمدة لدىهيئة حمايةالبي

provisions.title: c)Calibrated on site during installation, and Quarterly (Every 3 Months) against
provisions.content: c)Calibrated on site during installation, and Quarterly (Every 3 Months) againstUS EPA or EU approved cross reference method as listed above for both Mass andFlow Rate.

provisions.title: d)Detection limit: ≤ 10 μg/m3 for a 24hr cycle.
provisions.content: d)Detection limit: ≤ 10 μg/m3 for a 24hr cycle.

provisions.title: f) Airflow rate: ≤ 1.5 m3/hr with a rate regulation accuracy: ± 2%
provisions.content: f) Airflow rate: ≤ 1.5 m3/hr with a rate regulation accuracy: ± 2%

provisions.title: g)Non-Volatile memory with data storage of minimum 7 days within the device (1/4
provisions.content: g)Non-Volatile memory with data storage of minimum 7 days within the device (1/4hour average values)

provisions.title: h)Temperature, Relative Humidity, Wind Direction and Wind Speed at location ofmo
provisions.content: h)Temperature, Relative Humidity, Wind Direction and Wind Speed at location ofmonitoring instrument to be provided together with PM concentrationreadings.

provisions.content: 1-Quarterly flow rate checks with NIST-traceable standards,

provisions.title: 2-Performance Evaluation (collocation) of the Federal Equivalence Methods (FEM)s
provisions.content: 2-Performance Evaluation (collocation) of the Federal Equivalence Methods (FEM)samplers and monitors listed above under Acceptance Methods against afilter-based FRM at Installation and once every quarter.

provisions.title: 3-Technical Systems Audit (TSA) to be performed by the Contractor of each sitepr
provisions.content: 3-Technical Systems Audit (TSA) to be performed by the Contractor of each siteprior to beginning monitoring.

provisions.title: Supplement(2): Technical Requirements for the Placement and Installation of the
provisions.content: Supplement(2): Technical Requirements for the Placement and Installation of the AirQuality Monitoring Station

provisions.title: Whenchoosing the installation site, owners must take into account thefollowing:
provisions.content: Whenchoosing the installation site, owners must take into account thefollowing:

provisions.title: 1- Placein an open area, away from the main crushing plant operations and roads
provisions.content: 1- Placein an open area, away from the main crushing plant operations and roads –In many cases the quarry office area is suitable if residential areas around thelease lines are further than 1 km.

provisions.title: 2- Ifresidential areas exist within 1km of the lease area, then the monitoringst
provisions.content: 2- Ifresidential areas exist within 1km of the lease area, then the monitoringstation should be placed within the quarry lease area in the direction of theresidential area.

provisions.title: 3- Ifseveral residential areas exist around the lease area within 1km, then them
provisions.content: 3- Ifseveral residential areas exist around the lease area within 1km, then themonitoring station to be located downwind of the predominant winddirection.

provisions.title: 4- Mustbe at least 10m away from trees, Heat exchange units (A/C Compressors), e
provisions.content: 4- Mustbe at least 10m away from trees, Heat exchange units (A/C Compressors), exhaustfans etc.

provisions.title: 5- Not tobe located in the lee of structures to avoid their wind currents.
provisions.content: 5- Not tobe located in the lee of structures to avoid their wind currents.

provisions.title: 6- Openceiling above inlet necessary with clear open sky at 120 Deg. Angle above
provisions.content: 6- Openceiling above inlet necessary with clear open sky at 120 Deg. Angle above theinlet.

provisions.title: 7- Heightof inlet or sampling head to be within the 2m to 7m range above groundl
provisions.content: 7- Heightof inlet or sampling head to be within the 2m to 7m range above groundlevel.

provisions.title: 8-Availability of stable power & communication network for continuousmonitoring
provisions.content: 8-Availability of stable power & communication network for continuousmonitoring and data transmission.

provisions.title: 9- Secureplace to prevent damage and vandalism.
provisions.content: 9- Secureplace to prevent damage and vandalism.

provisions.title: 10-Minimum of 2 meters of separation from walls,parapets and structures is requi
provisions.content: 10-Minimum of 2 meters of separation from walls,parapets and structures is requiredfor rooftop site placement.
